acceptance_criteria: A different fresh reviewer confirms fixed pre-Phase-3 renderer-derived views are outside the Phase-3 Resolution-aware Projection contract with no precursor engine or provenance subset.

All normal and bounded negative proof remains green after the review handoff and ledger append.
The reviewer reports no unresolved actionable finding before HCM-0.1 closes.
stop_conditions: Keep HCM-0.1 open if any actionable finding remains.
Dispatch a separate bounded remediation instead of widening the review if a new issue appears.
